summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gem Crush Match-3 puzzle game. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend core functionality working with minor modal overlay issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on shop purchase buttons, daily reward claim button, and leaderboard interactions

passed_tests: Backend: All 15 API endpoints working (100% success)
Frontend: Name input and player creation flow
Frontend: Main menu with all 4 buttons (Play, Shop, Daily, Ranks)
Frontend: Player stats display (lives, coins, level)
Frontend: Shop modal opens and displays all items with correct prices
Frontend: Daily rewards modal with 7-day calendar
Frontend: Game board rendering (8x8 gem grid detected)
Frontend: Game HUD elements (lives, coins, score)
Frontend: Watch ad buttons for free rewards
Backend-Frontend integration: Player creation API call successful
Backend-Frontend integration: Shop prices loaded correctly
Backend-Frontend integration: Daily reward status loaded
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay CSS z-index issues preventing clicks on buttons inside modals (shop purchases, daily reward claims, leaderboard interactions). The modal-overlay div is intercepting pointer events.
